summary: Iteration 141 - Frontend testing for 10 UI restructuring changes. 8/9 features tested and PASSED. All major features working correctly.

issues: ComplianceModal appears on every page visit - may need 'Don't show again' checkbox to persist
Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render

critical_code_review_comments: PersonalDashboard.jsx: 6 tabs correctly implemented - Overview, Net Worth, Retirement, Insights, Wealth Trends, Investments
PersonalDashboard.jsx: Investments tab sorts assets alphabetically using .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name))
navData.js: All nav sections sorted alphabetically - Dashboard (Markets, My Dashboard), Investments, Planning (Budget, Goals, Rebalancing, Research, Retirement), Settings, Tools
navData.js: Client context nav has NO separate Investments link - merged into Overview tabs
AdvisorCommandCenter.jsx: 2 tabs - 'Dashboard & Briefing' and 'Decision Centre'. DailyBriefing embedded in dashboard tab
TaxLossHarvesting.jsx: Client-side fallback calculation working when API unavailable
HouseholdBudget.jsx: 'Available to Invest' card with data-testid='investable-surplus' and 'View Investments' button
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 UI restructuring changes verified working. Personal Dashboard at /dashboard has 6 tabs: Overview/Net Worth/Retirement/Insights/Wealth Trends/Investments. Investments tab sorts alphabetically. LHS sidebar sorted alphabetically. Adviser Command Center has 2 tabs: Dashboard & Briefing (merged) and Decision Centre. Tax Loss Harvesting works with client-side fallback. Budget page shows 'Available to Invest' callout with 'View Investments' button. Client context nav has no separate Investments link (merged into Overview tabs). ComplianceModal appears on first visit - dismiss by pressing Escape or clicking checkbox + Accept button.

personal_dashboard_tabs.details: 6 tabs present: Overview, Net Worth, Retirement, Insights, Wealth Trends, Investments. All tabs have correct data-testid attributes.

investments_alphabetical_sort.details: Investments sorted alphabetically: BHP Group Shares, Bitcoin (Coinbase), CBA Shares (DRP), Colonial First State Balanced, David - AustralianSuper, Emergency Fund - ING Savings, etc.

sidebar_alphabetical_order.details: Personal Mode: Dashboard > Investments > Planning > Settings > Tools. Adviser Mode: AI & Tasks > Compliance > CRM > Dashboard > Execution > Integrations > Tools. Within sections: Markets before My Dashboard, Budget before Goals before Rebalancing.

adviser_command_center_tabs.details: 2 tabs: 'Dashboard & Briefing' (merged) and 'Decision Centre'. Daily Briefing content embedded in Dashboard tab. Next Best Actions, Advisor Intelligence Feed, Client Insights, Portfolio Alerts all visible.

tax_loss_harvesting.details: Client-side fallback calculation working. Shows 'Analysis complete (client-side calculation)' message. Displays Potential Tax Savings, Harvestable Losses, Unrealized Gains, Harvesting Opportunities table, and Recommendations.

budget_investable_surplus.details: 'Available to Invest' card found with data-testid='investable-surplus'. Shows $18,324/month. 'View Investments' button present with data-testid='invest-surplus-btn'. What-If toggle present.

client_overview_tabs.details: UnifiedClientOverview.jsx has 2 tabs: Overview and Investments. Overview embeds PersonalDashboard, Investments embeds UnifiedInvestments.

client_context_no_investments_link.details: clientContextNav in navData.js has NO separate Investments link. /dashboard labeled as 'Client Overview' with title 'Overview & Investments'.

overview_tab_content.details: Overview tab contains: Asset Allocation pie chart, Holdings by Entity bar chart, Portfolio Rebalancing Suggestions, Retirement Readiness, Net Worth, Quick Actions, Smart Insights, Documents & Actions.

mocked_apis_list: Tax Loss Harvesting uses client-side calculation as fallback when API unavailable
Demo client data mocked in App.js
Market data fallback to mock when API unavailable
